name: /start replies with welcome and an inline keyboard main menu

payload.text:
Welcome! I'm your reservation assistant.

How to make a reservation:
1. Browse availability
2. Select a date and time
3. Confirm your details

Use the buttons below to reserve, get help, or configure restaurant settings (for owners only).

Use the menu below to get started:

⚙️ Settings is for restaurant owners to configure opening hours, table inventory, and venue settings — visible only to admin accounts.

name: menu:about callback replies with about text and the menu

payload.text: I am the AGNTDEV bot, built with the grammY framework and the AGNTDEV bot toolkit. I help you build, test, and deploy Telegram bots.

name: menu:help callback replies with help text and the menu

payload.text:
Available commands:
/start — Show the main menu

Use the menu buttons below to navigate.

name: menu:settings callback replies with settings text and the menu

payload.text: Settings are managed through the bot's environment and persistent storage. Use the menu below to navigate.

name: non-command text still replies with a prompt
